meta.siteDescription: A cinematic portfolio by Karez Peshawa, combining frontend engineering, product thinking, and design-aware execution.

cockpit.title: Designing and building digital experiences with structure, polish, and real delivery behind them.
cockpit.body: I work across frontend engineering, UX thinking, and visual execution. Most recently at Reaktion, I helped ship live client work from early design direction through production-ready implementation.

overview.intro: A guided portfolio journey through selected work, professional direction, and contact.

projects.title: Projects that show delivery, interface judgment, and technical range.
projects.intro: This selection focuses on work that demonstrates real implementation, visual discipline, and product thinking rather than volume.

cards.title: HRnytt
cards.summary: Responsive redesign of a Swedish HR news platform, from concept and Figma system through frontend implementation and launch.

detail.description:
HRnytt is one of Sweden's leading digital platforms for HR professionals, delivering news, analysis, and editorial content to the human resources community. The platform needed a complete responsive redesign to modernize its reading experience, improve accessibility, and create a consistent visual system across all device sizes.

I was responsible for the frontend — from early concept exploration and building a component-based Figma design system, through semantic HTML/CSS/Python implementation, to final launch. The project was driven in collaboration with a backend developer via GitHub, where we coordinated deliveries and code reviews throughout the process.
highlights: Built a complete Figma design system from scratch with reusable, scalable components
Implemented a fully responsive frontend with semantic HTML, CSS, and Python
Collaborated with a backend developer via GitHub with code reviews and coordinated deliveries
Prioritized editorial readability with clear typographic hierarchy and content structure
Delivered accessibility improvements aligned with WCAG guidelines
Launched as a live production website serving real users

cards.title: Linnea Medical Care
cards.summary: Fullstack corporate healthcare website built from Figma design to production in Webflow — design, CMS, backend, and launch.

detail.description:
Linné Medical Care is a corporate healthcare company in Bromma, Stockholm, offering personalized, authorized care. The project involved building the entire website from scratch — from design concept to finished production and launch.

I worked closely with the production manager to understand the client's needs and vision. After reviewing the client's brief, I drew inspiration from Japanese harmonious therapy websites, which shaped a calm, balanced, and trust-building design. At the first presentation, the client was very pleased, and I moved directly into building the site.

I was solely responsible for everything: Figma design, Webflow development, CMS setup, responsive implementation, and final launch.
highlights: Solely responsible for the entire project — from Figma design to Webflow production and launch
Close collaboration with production manager to understand client needs and desires
Design inspiration from Japanese harmonious therapy to create calm, balance, and trust
Built CMS structure in Webflow for easy content management
Client very satisfied at the first design presentation
Responsive implementation with focus on accessibility and professional tone

about.title: A frontend developer with strong design instincts and a bias toward shipping.
about.intro: I am currently completing a 7-month internship at Reaktion, where I have delivered two live client websites and worked across design, development, accessibility, and collaboration with broader teams.
about.body: My strongest work sits between product clarity and frontend execution. I enjoy turning rough requirements into interfaces that feel structured, calm, and ready for real users. I also bring a systems mindset to tools and workflow, and I have introduced AI-assisted ways of working that are now part of my team's daily process.
timeline: Delivered live client work at Reaktion from design direction to production frontend.
Built bilingual and accessibility-aware interfaces for real organizations.
Contributed product and visual thinking beyond pure implementation.
Introduced AI-assisted tools that are now part of daily team workflow.

contact.title: Available for ambitious teams that value frontend quality and design judgment.
contact.intro: I am looking for opportunities where I can contribute across interface quality, implementation detail, and product thinking.
contact.availability: Currently open to internship and junior-to-mid frontend opportunities, especially in teams where design and engineering work closely together.
contact.responseNote: The strongest outreach is specific: team, role, product, and why the fit makes sense.
channels: Internship opportunities starting with strong frontend and UX ownership
Junior-to-mid frontend roles with close design collaboration
Selected freelance or project-based digital product work

references.quote: Very curious, engaged and capable junior frontend developer with strong responsibility for learning and delivery.
